headline: A Look At Centene’s (CNC) Valuation After Withdrawing 2025 Guidance Over ACA And Medicaid Headwinds
summary: Why the withdrawal of 2025 guidance matters for Centene (CNC) Centene (CNC) has withdrawn its 2025 guidance after higher than expected risk in ACA marketplaces and rising Medicaid cost trends, putting the stock under closer scrutiny from investors watching these pressure points. See our latest analysis for Centene. At a share price of $35.11, Centene has a 7 day share price return of 9.72% after a sharp 30 day share price return decline of 18.86%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 43.31%...
